description: Talk about walking comfort in dress shoes, and there's no better brand that can offer it than rockport. To experience the delightful feeling of walking on air all day long, slip your feet into the Mubleno oxfords from rockport. Engineered with the Dynamic Suspension technology, it is the perfect pair of formal shoes for those long days at work. A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant.Upper Full-grain distressed leather upper for added durability, style and comfort Fabric lining for better breathability Tapered square apron toe design for a sleek look Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Contrast intricate stitch detailing for added style and durability Rolled, padded collar for extra comfort and a snug fit Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Dynamic Suspension technology that creates a thin air cushion under the foot, moving according to the pressure of your foot from heel to toe, ensuring maximum comfort even with the slightest movement Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Stacked heel for a better grip Textured pattern on the heel, midfoot and forefoot for better grip Flex grooves on the forefoot and heel for ease of movement and improving grip on various surfaces shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
